column1: わざわざお越しいただき、ありがとうございます。
column2: わざわざおこしいただき、ありがとうございます。
column3: Thank you very much for going out of your way to come.
column4: わざわざ (expressly / going out of one's way / taking the trouble to)
column5: わざわざ + Verb (speaker went out of their way to do V)
column6: indicating that someone went to special or unnecessary trouble to do something; can express gratitude or mild reproach
column8: わざわざ = special effort or unnecessary trouble; せっかく = opportunity/effort (emotive regret or positive); あえて = deliberately (despite knowing risks)
